rationale: Adjudicator confirmed a completeness-axis delta: the baseline response omitted bacterial meningitis from the differential for a <=90-day febrile infant, which the rubric's safety-critical criterion (R1) flags as an automatic miss regardless of the other axes; the modified-path response restored the enumeration and the meningitis rule-out language, producing the rubric-score delta the harness was designed to surface.
